response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a strong full-stack and web engineer with a broad portfolio, but he is fundamentally mismatched for this role. His C++ exposure is limited to roughly 6 months at National Instruments (2014–2015) and a bachelor thesis project, far short of the mandatory 5–10 years. His primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js, and there is no evidence of Windows-platform C++ development, SQL Server or Oracle experience, capital markets domain knowledge, fixed income or derivatives work, or familiarity with any relevant financial platforms such as Summit.
strengths: CI/CD, DevOps, and infrastructure experience (GitLab, Docker, Artifactory) covers one desirable skill area
Java development background from multiple roles (Altom, NI) satisfies one optional requirement
Strong communication skills demonstrated through public talks, workshops, and teaching engagements
concerns: C++ experience is negligible (~6 months professional) versus the 5–10 year mandatory requirement
Zero capital markets, fixed income, derivatives, or investment banking domain exposure
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; no Windows-platform development evident in any role

key_factors.factor: No capital markets or fixed income domain knowledge
